title: Positive flow: Navigate to the post and read the content
test_steps: Open the Talklife app. | Navigate to the post with the text 'Pretty much irritated You always help somebody on here But when you need it nobody gives a fuck' and two neutral face emojis. | Read the post content.
expected_result: The post content is displayed correctly. | The username 'Anonymous' and the timestamp '7 mins ago' are visible.

title: Negative flow: Attempt to like the post without being logged in
preconditions: The user is not logged in to the Talklife app.
test_steps: Open the Talklife app. | Navigate to the post with the text 'Pretty much irritated You always help somebody on here But when you need it nobody gives a fuck' and two neutral face emojis. | Click on the like icon (2).
expected_result: The like icon is not clickable, and an error message is displayed indicating that the user is not logged in.

title: Boundary validation: Check the number of comments
test_steps: Open the Talklife app. | Navigate to the post with the text 'Pretty much irritated You always help somebody on here But when you need it nobody gives a fuck' and two neutral face emojis. | Click on the comment icon (1).
expected_result: The number of comments is displayed as 1.

title: Toggle state: Click on the star icon to favorite the post
test_steps: Open the Talklife app. | Navigate to the post with the text 'Pretty much irritated You always help somebody on here But when you need it nobody gives a fuck' and two neutral face emojis. | Click on the star icon.
expected_result: The star icon is toggled to indicate that the post is now favorited.

title: Clickable buttons: Click on the like, comment, and star icons
test_steps: Open the Talklife app. | Navigate to the post with the text 'Pretty much irritated You always help somebody on here But when you need it nobody gives a fuck' and two neutral face emojis. | Click on the like icon (2). | Click on the comment icon (1). | Click on the star icon.
expected_result: The like, comment, and star icons are clickable and perform their respective actions.

title: Accessibility: Ensure the post content is accessible to users with screen readers
test_steps: Open the Talklife app. | Navigate to the post with the text 'Pretty much irritated You always help somebody on here But when you need it nobody gives a fuck' and two neutral face emojis. | Use a screen reader to verify that the post content is accessible.
expected_result: The post content is accessible to users with screen readers.

title: Usability: Ensure the post content is easy to read
test_steps: Open the Talklife app. | Navigate to the post with the text 'Pretty much irritated You always help somebody on here But when you need it nobody gives a fuck' and two neutral face emojis. | Verify that the post content is easy to read.
expected_result: The post content is easy to read.
